{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Purelake Temple
| introduced = cradle-02-soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Purelake Temple]] is comparable in influence to the [[Jai clan]]'s branch in the [[Transcendent Ruins]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c6">''Soulsmith'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
